sections.sectionTitle: Job in Nidanga a Nopsakna Phawkkik

verses.text: Tua ciangin Job in a thu genkik a
“Ka nuntakna nidanga bang hi kik hen la, Pasian in kei hong et hun lai bang hong hi kik leh ka ut hi
Tua hun lai-in Pasian in kei hong ompih tawntung a, khuamial sungah ka pai laitakin khuavak hong pia hi
Tua hun pen ka cihtheih hun laitak hi a, Pasian in ka innkuan a hong hut laitak hun ahi hi
Tua hun lai-in Vanglian Pasian in kei hong ompih a, ka kimkotah ka tate a om uh hi
Ka bawngte leh ka keelte in nawi deih zahzah hong pia uh a, suang tam penna nangawnah ka oliv kungte hoih mahmah hi
Khuasung upate a kikhop uh ciangin a kikhawm dingin kei ka pai ciangin
kei hong muh phetun khangnote in tutna hong awn uh a, kei hong zahtakna limun papite na ding uh hi
Khuasung uliante a kiho na khawl pah uh a, a khut uh tawh a kam uh na hum uh hi
Mi a thupi pente nangawn na gamdai pah uh a, kuamah pauloin na om uh hi
“Ka thugen a za mi peuhmah in a hoihlamin na za uh a, a hong mu mi peuhmah in dik hong sa uh hi
Mizawng ka theih peuhmah ka huh tawntung a, cihna ding theilo tagahte zong ka huh hi
A lungkham a cimawhte in kei hong phat uh a, meigong numeite a lungnuamin ka omsak hi
Thuman, puan bangin ka silh a, thuman in kei hong tuam hi. Thutang, puanpi-in ka silh a, thutang in kei hong tuam hi
Mittaw mite-a' dingin mittang ka hi a, khebai mite-a' dingin khe ka hi hi
Mizawngte-a' dingin a pa uh ka hi a, lungkhamna a thuak, ka theihloh mite nangawn ka pan'pih tawntung hi
Migilote' gitlohna khempeuh ka susia gawpmang a, amau' sukgawp mi khempeuh ka honkhia hi
“Ka nuntak kum sehnel zahin a tam dingin ka ngaihsun a, lungnuam takin inn-ah a si dingin ka kilamen hi
A zung in tui a ngah tawntung singkung tawh ka kibang a, daitui in a hiangte a nomsak singkung tawh ka kibang hi
Mi khempeuh in kei hong phat tawntung uh a, ka tha a hat tawntung hi
Mite in ka thugen ngai-in hong ngak dimdem uh a, kuamah pau hetloin limtakin hong ngai uh hi
Thu ka gen khit ciangin a genthuah ding uh bangmah thei nawnlo uh a, ka thugente khempeuh hoihtakin na sang pah uh hi
Lo khote in khuapi guah deih mahmahin a ngak bangin, ka thugente khempeuh hoihtakin na sang uh hi
Itna tawh ka nuihsat ciangin amaute lungnuam mahmah uh a, ka mai a taii ciangin a maigumna uh a bei hi
Amaute ukin a vai ding uh ka hawmsak a, kumpipa in a galkapte a makaih bangin ka makai a, a lungkham uh ciangin amaute ka hehnem hi.
